channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senate passes major housing package with broad bipartisan support
item.description: The Senate approved its most significant housing reform legislation in decades.

item.title: What a $75,000 salary can afford for a home in the current market
item.description: Considering homeownership? Here is what a $75,000 income can realistically support today.

item.title: Current interest earnings on a $75,000 CD account
item.description: A CD account of this size can generate significant interest. Savers should know the latest rates.

item.title: ICE fines immigration attorney for alleged false asylum claims, a first for the agency
item.description: Doddamani is accused of filing 32 immigration cases with 64 fraudulent documents.
